candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line at the top of the income statement; appropriate top-line measure.
Also a valid top-line sales label and numerically identical to Total Revenue in the preview; useful as fallback if label changes across years.

variables.notes: Priority list for revenue label changes across years; do not sum.

candidates.why: Direct production/input cost line and the clearest cost-of-sales equivalent.

variables.notes: Selected the direct cost line corresponding to cost of goods sold.

candidates.why: Operating overhead bucket likely containing administrative/selling external costs.
Explicit SG&A line; per hierarchy this is preferred when present.
Additional overhead bucket; not a total/subtotal.
Not an expense row and should not be used for SG&A.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists but is mostly blank in the preview, so included it plus closest overhead buckets for coverage across years. Excluded totals/balancing rows and non-expense headcount row.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: This is amortization of capitalized R&D, not current-period R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset row, not income statement R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet accumulated amortization row, not R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balance sheet balancing row, not expense.

variables.notes: No clear R&D expense line is reported on the provided statements. Capitalized R&D asset/amortization rows do not satisfy XRD.

candidates.why: Clear interest expense line and the best reported single interest-expense item available.
Generic preferred label for interest expense, though blank in preview; include as higher-priority fallback if populated in other years.
Lease interest component, but this is a separate component rather than a full reported interest-expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest disclosure, not preferred over the main reported interest expense line.

variables.notes: Priority list for label changes across years. Excluded lease-interest component rows from final choice because XINT should map to a single reported interest-expense line, not a sum of components.

candidates.why: Owner/parent equity line that excludes non-controlling interests; preferred for book equity.
Includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred because BE should exclude MIB.
Balancing row, not appropriate when the actual equity line exists.
Balancing row, not appropriate.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet line, not book equity.

variables.notes: Preferred owner equity line that excludes non-controlling interests, avoiding double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation line, not preferred for balance-sheet minority interest.
Direct balance sheet non-controlling interests line; preferred for MIB.
Equivalent balance sheet label and useful fallback if naming changes across years.
Income statement allocation line, not preferred for balance-sheet MIB.

candidates.row_label: Total Comprehensive Income Attributable to Non-Controlling Interests
candidates.why: Comprehensive income allocation, not minority equity.

variables.notes: Priority list for balance-sheet minority interest label changes across years; do not sum.
